entries.text: Spent the last couple days building out the personal site — mostly the writing page and a public build-log that summarizes what I've actually been working on every couple days. Got pulled into a long fight keeping an X/Twitter feed alive: tried a rotating set of Nitter and RSSHub fallbacks, then a cached database approach so it survives flaky uptime, and ended up prototyping a small browser extension to keep the feed populated when everything else fails. Also added Substack and music scrobble sections to the same page.
Genesis given persistent memory across sessions and its own terminal goals. Ongoing.
Boréal Numérique paused — outreach ran its course, one discovery call booked. Case-study gap still open.
